landing.hero_subtitle: Real-time flood monitoring, emergency dispatch, and citizen guidance powered by Copernicus Earth Observation and Galileo GNSS.
landing.feature_alerts_desc: Broadcast critical flood warnings to citizens in affected zones with severity-based targeting.
landing.feature_map_desc: Interactive map with evacuation shelters, assembly points, and real-time occupancy tracking.
landing.feature_satellite_desc: Water level monitoring, NDWI analysis, and precipitation forecasts from Copernicus.
landing.feature_industrial_desc: Factory flood risk assessment, sensor telemetry, and employee safety management.
